trips.searchSubtitle: Filter by city, date, and budget to find the perfect route.
trips.publishSubtitle: Propose a new trip and share the costs.
trips.driverOnly: Only registered drivers can propose trips.
trips.addVehiclePrompt: Add a vehicle below to publish your trip.
trips.searchSubtitle: Browse hundreds of daily rides and travel at a lower cost.
trips.tryAdjusting: Try adjusting your filters to find more results.

profile.title: Profile settings
profile.subtitle: Manage vehicles, payment methods, and preferences.
profile.personalNote: To change these details, contact an administrator.
profile.adminNotice: Custom settings are available for passengers and drivers.

hero.title: Travel further,
hero.subtitle: Tawsila connects travelers and drivers for safe shared rides. Book your seat, manage your trips, and pay online.

features.sectionSubtitle: A complete platform to simplify all your commutes

smartMatch.title: Smart matching
smartMatch.description: Our algorithm finds the best rides matching your schedule and location.

securePayment.title: Secure payment
securePayment.description: Pay online with confidence using our transparent simulated payment system.

realTimeChat.title: Real-time chat
realTimeChat.description: Communicate directly with your driver through the built-in instant messaging.

ratings.title: Ratings & trust
ratings.description: Check driver reviews and travel with peace of mind.

instantBooking.title: Instant booking
instantBooking.description: Some drivers auto-accept — book your seat in one click.

mapPreview.title: Route preview
mapPreview.description: Visualize the complete route on an interactive map before booking.

step1.title: Search
step1.description: Enter your destination and dates to find available rides.

step2.title: Book
step2.description: Choose a ride, confirm your seat, and pay online.

step3.title: Travel
step3.description: Meet your driver at the departure point and enjoy the ride.

cta.title: Ready to share the road?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of people saving on their daily commute.

footer.tagline: The carpooling platform for all Tunisiens.

reservations.subtitlePassenger: Track the status of your booked seats and payments.
reservations.subtitleDriver: Manage passengers for your trips and approve requests.
reservations.acceptConfirmSubtitle: By accepting this request, you agree to provide transportation for the passenger.
reservations.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this reservation?
reservations.cancelConfirmSubtitle: This action is irreversible and may impact your rating if done frequently.
reservations.noReservationsSubtitle: You don't have any reservations linked to your account yet.
reservations.acceptSuccessSubtitle: The passenger has been notified. You can now contact them via chat.

tripDetails.tripNotFoundSubtitle: This trip doesn't exist or is no longer available.
tripDetails.addPaymentMethodFirst: You must first add a payment method.
tripDetails.closeTripConfirm: Do you want to close this trip? No new reservations will be accepted.
tripDetails.tripFull: This trip is full. No seats available.

admin.userManagementSubtitle: View, block, or suspend user accounts.
admin.accessDenied: Access denied. You must be an administrator.
admin.blockConfirm: Do you really want to block this user permanently?
admin.suspendConfirm: Do you want to temporarily suspend this user?
admin.superviseTripsSubtitle: View all trips published on the platform.
admin.noTrips: No trips have been published yet.
admin.errorFetchingHealth: Could not retrieve system health. The backend might be offline.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Keep an eye on trip confirmations and important messages.

payments.title: Payments
payments.subtitle: Manage your cards and settle your pending reservations.
payments.howItWorksDesc: You don't need to pay manually. Once you add your card, the amount is secured when you book a trip. The payment is automatically validated only when the driver accepts your reservation.
payments.driverNoticeDesc: Your earnings are managed directly via the platform. You don't need to add a payment method.
payments.validationError: Please fill the fields correctly (last 4 digits required)

meta.homeDescription: Carpooling platform in Tunisia. Find or offer rides, pay online, and travel safely.
